chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3578 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ ذَهَبَ فِي حَاجَةٍ عَلَى غَيْرِ وُضُوءٍ فَلَمْ تُقْضَ حَاجَتُهُ فَلاَ يَلُومَنَّ إِلاَّ نَفْسَهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3578 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever goes to fulfill a need without being in a state of ablution, and his need is not fulfilled, let him blame none but himself."
